heroSubheading: India's Largest SEZ — Nagpur's Fastest Appreciating Zone
introduction: MIHAN — the Multi-modal International Cargo Hub and Airport at Nagpur — is one of India's most ambitious infrastructure projects. Covering 4,354 hectares on Nagpur's Wardha Road, it hosts AIIMS Nagpur, IIM Nagpur, an international cargo airport, IT parks, and a sprawling Special Economic Zone. This has turned the MIHAN corridor into Nagpur's single most sought-after real estate destination in 2025. Localities adjacent to MIHAN — including Sumthana, Jamtha, and Beltarodi — have seen annual property appreciation of 20–40% over the last three years. Early investors have already recorded 2x returns on their land holdings. Mahalaxmi Infra's projects in this corridor are NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved, and eligible for up to 90% bank financing.
whyInvest: AIIMS Nagpur, IIM Nagpur, and International Airport within zone

faqs.question: Is MIHAN Nagpur good for property investment?
faqs.answer: Yes. MIHAN is Nagpur's fastest appreciating real estate zone with 20–40% annual appreciation.

faqs.question: Which areas are closest to MIHAN?
faqs.answer: Sumthana, Jamtha, Beltarodi, and Besa are closest to MIHAN on the Wardha Road corridor.

faqs.answer: Mahalaxmi Infra plots near MIHAN start from ₹22 Lakh. Contact us for current pricing.
